rationale: The citing paper explicitly positions itself in marketing deterrence/punishment research (e.g., threat design beyond certainty/severity/speed and spillovers via advice networks), which aligns closely with the cited paper’s core mechanisms on punishment severity, fairness, and observer effects in a network setting. Given this strong conceptual overlap and a confirmed DOI-level reference match (10.1509/jmr.12.0142), this is not safely an incidental mention and should be reviewed in full relation judgment.
